   #!/bin/bash
   # Remediation for sysctl_net_ipv4_icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts
   # Comment out existing entries in the specified directories
   for f in /etc/sysctl.d/*.conf /run/sysctl.d/*.conf /usr/local/lib/sysctl.d/*.conf; do
        # skip systemd-sysctl symlink (/etc/sysctl.d/99-sysctl.conf -> /etc/sysctl.conf)
        if [[ "$(readlink -f "$f")" == "/etc/sysctl.conf" ]]; then
                continue
        fi
        # Comment out any line that sets net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts (commented or not)
        if grep -P '^(?!#).*[\s]*net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts.*$' "$f" > /dev/null; then
                sed -i 's/^\(.*net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts.*$\)/# \1/' "$f"
        fi
   done

   # Now ensure the line is present in /etc/sysctl.d/99-sysctl.conf
   if ! grep -P '^[\s]*net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_broadcasts.*$' /etc/sysctl.d/99-sysctl.conf > /dev/null; then
